Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS MARC HOLCOMB, JOHN ZABLAN AND DAGOBERTO RIVERA'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction.
APPEARANCES: Curtis G. Oler, Esq., 415-346-8015, Law Office of Curtis G. Oler, for Plaintiff and Moving Party; Noel Wheeler paralegal to Randall J. Lee, Esq., present with a proposed order.
RULING: Mr. Oler failed to comply with Tentative Ruling - CRC 324 and did not object to the Court adopting its tentative ruling - Deny - Failed to sustain burden. Prevailing party to prepare order and comply with CRC 391. Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #264
